mission.title: backstage: 🐛 Bug Report: createUnifiedTheme does not allow overrides for Backstage components
mission.description: 🐛 Bug Report: createUnifiedTheme does not allow overrides for Backstage components. This issue affects 15+ users.

steps.title: Identify backstage troubleshoot symptoms
steps.description:
Check for the issue in your backstage installation:
```bash
npx backstage-cli info
```
Look for errors or warnings that may indicate the issue.

steps.title: Review backstage configuration
steps.description:
Review the relevant backstage configuration:
### 📜 Description

Neither the v4 nor the v5 Theme currently supports overrides for non Material-UI components when created via the new createUnifiedTheme

steps.title: Apply the fix for 🐛 Bug Report: createUnifiedTheme does not allow overrides…
Confirm 🐛 Bug Report: createUnifiedTheme does not allow… is resolved
steps.description:
Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:
Test backstage to confirm the issue is resolved.
Confirm that the issue symptoms are gone.

resolution.summary:
